data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for equal opportunity in booking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Equal opportunity (no priority tiers)', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case describes a scenario where multiple users are notified and can attempt to book, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system treats all users equally without any priority tiers. This leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming that all users have equal opportunity without priority tiers.
